name: Jonathan Edwards
title: Theologian & Preacher
bio: American revivalist preacher, philosopher, and Congregationalist Protestant theologian. Key figure in the First Great Awakening and third president of Princeton University.
faith: Edwards is widely regarded as America's greatest theologian. His sermon 'Sinners in the Hands of an Angry God' is one of the most famous sermons in American history. His theological works on the nature of true virtue and religious affections remain deeply influential.

sources.title: Sinners in the Hands of an Angry God — Wikipedia
sources.note: His most famous sermon from the First Great Awakening

sources.title: The Jonathan Edwards Center at Yale University
sources.note: Academic center preserving Edwards's works and legacy

tagline: Preached Sinners in the Hands of an Angry God and sparked revival
